title: 10 possible side effects of Melaleuca alternifolia (Tea Tree) if used improperly
intro: Melaleuca alternifolia, also known as tea tree oil, can have various health side effects if used improperly. It can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and skin inflammation when applied to the skin without diluting it properly. Ingesting tea tree oil can lead to serious health issues, such as confusion, loss of coordination, and drowsiness. Moreover, it can cause damage to the liver and kidneys if ingested in large amounts. Additionally, it's important to note that tea tree oil should not be used on children or pets, as it can cause serious harm to them as well. Therefore, it's crucial to use tea tree oil with caution and follow proper usage guidelines to avoid any potential health risks.
